title: Some House Democrats press Trump to break silence on Israel’s nuclear arsenal
summary_full: A letter from 29 lawmakers calls on the U.S. to expose Israel’s weapons program, which it doesn’t acknowledge and was built in secret beginning in the late 1950s.
summary_public: A letter from 29 lawmakers calls on the U.S. to expose Israel’s weapons program, which it doesn’t acknowledge and was built in secret beginning in the late 1950s.
